title: It Is the Law
writer: Curtis Benton, Elmer Rice, Hayden Talbot
actors: Arthur Hohl, Herbert Heyes, Mona Palma
plot: Albert Woodruff is rejected by pretty Ruth Allen in favor of his friend, Justin Victor. Albert gets his revenge by faking his own death--by finding a man who looks just like him and killing him--then making it look like Justin mur...
